# charter-0003: Knowledge distribution charter

## Purpose

Fix how the knowledge context distributes settled decisions to the bounded
contexts that consume them.

## Boundaries

The charter governs distribution only; it incorporates the current-state
decision adr-0040 and does not itself decide projection tiers.
